review: I am trying to relocate over to the coast. I really liked the photos so I decided to call. when I called I told them I had a few questions about their property. I asked if they had 3 and 4 bed rooms only. she cut me off and told me they only have 4 beds to rent right now. I said it might be a while till we can move as in a months. she cut me off again and said well them you should call about a month before you move and ill answer any question then. I felt like I did not matter since I was not moving in next week. well i'm sorry I just might have rent another apartment down the road. my family was interested in 4 apartment. we are all moving so that we can be together. but I don't think we will be moving here. I just had questions about deposits.

Warning if you move here, nothing will be done about the noise and or threats made to you by neighbors that cuss you out or threaten you and your family. The ethnic groups have priority and noting is done because they use the minority card, their (high-school aged boy) is even aloud to urinate off the balcony!!! They lie to the cops....They can do pretty much do what ever they want. They can do day care in their apt for 3- 4 (24 -7) days at a time, and even commit fraud by being on state aid and have their spouse stay with them on and off....still nothing is done. My daughter is now scared to walk our dog because she is being stalked by some older guy that follows her around whenever she goes outside! Last month there was a guy with a gun or knife running around. Complaints and emails are completely ignore and unanswered by the management and if they are answered they want you to meet with the person that has threatened you but, they are johnny on the spot when it comes to you being late with the rent money....Its all a gimmick so you will move out and they can move someone in, they make more money this way. Oh and by the way when your rent is not paid....management shares it with people in the apartment complex...who go around calling people thieves when they are outside walking around!!! Please beware when you rent here....it is very dangerous and the cops are here a lot and I will repeat! your business is not confidential....it is shared by the management to others!!!!!!!
